header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.source: Max tokens must be greater than 0 and within the allowed limit for the selected model.
trans-unit.target: Max tokens must be greater than 0 and within the allowed limit for the selected model.

trans-unit.source: Temperature must be a number between 0 and 2.
trans-unit.target: Temperature must be a number between 0 and 2.
